mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_USER( EMPNO, EMAIL, PASSWORD, NAME, POSITION, DEPTNO, STATUS, STARTED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES( #{empno}, #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{position}, #{deptno}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO TF_USER( EMPNO, EMAIL, PASSWORD, NAME, POSITION, DEPTNO, STATUS, STARTED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES( #{empno}, #{email}, '12345678', #{name}, #{position}, #{deptno}, #{status}, null, sysdate, sysdate )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_USER SET EMAIL = #{email}, PASSWORD = #{password}, NAME = #{name}, POSITION = #{position}, DEPTNO = #{deptno}, STATUS = #{status}, STARTED_AT = #{startedAt}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE EMPNO = #{empno}
UPDATE TF_USER SET EMAIL = #{email}, NAME = #{name}, POSITION = #{position}, DEPTNO = #{deptno}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = sysdate WHERE EMPNO = #{empno}
